r2_outcome: READY — all agents passed R2 audit with zero HIGH/MODERATE findings

r3_tally.psq-agent: NOT-READY (7 findings: 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 1 LOW, 1 INFORMATIONAL)

r3_outcome: NOT-READY — 2 of 4 agents not ready under strict mode. Primary blocking items: psq-agent OpenRouter key plaintext (HIGH), addressed-copy turn collision in state.db (MEDIUM, shared across psq-agent and psychology-agent). Human decides: remediate and run round 4, or formally accept by-design findings and close.
shared_finding: Duplicate turn numbers in state.db (addressed-copy indexing root cause) affects both psq-agent and psychology-agent. Schema change required. Estimated effort: S. Tracking: to be added to TODO.md.
